mapper.select: SELECT s.ID, s.SCRAP_CODE, s.TITLE, s.USE_COMPANY_ID, s.USE_ORG_ID, s.APPLY_USER, s.APPLY_REASON, s.EXECUTE_USER, s.EXECUTE_FULFIL_TIME, s.STATUS, s.DEL_FLAG, s.CREATE_BY, s.CREATE_BY_NAME, s.CREATE_TIME, s.UPDATE_BY, s.UPDATE_BY_NAME, s.UPDATE_TIME, s.FLOW_ID, d.DEPT_NAME as USE_COMPANY_NAME, u.DEPT_NAME as USE_ORG_NAME, su.USER_NAME as APPLY_USER_NAME, CASE s.STATUS WHEN 1 THEN '审批中' WHEN 2 THEN '审批成功' WHEN 3 THEN '审批未通过' ELSE '未知' END as STATUS_NAME FROM E_M_EQUIP_SCRAP s LEFT JOIN SYS_DEPT d ON s.USE_COMPANY_ID = d.ID LEFT JOIN SYS_DEPT u ON s.USE_ORG_ID = u.ID LEFT JOIN SYS_USER su ON s.APPLY_USER = su.ID AND su.STATUS != 0 WHERE s.ID = #{id} AND s.DEL_FLAG = 0

SELECT ID, SCRAP_CODE, TITLE, USE_COMPANY_ID, USE_ORG_ID, APPLY_USER, APPLY_REASON, EXECUTE_USER, EXECUTE_FULFIL_TIME, STATUS, DEL_FLAG, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, FLOW_ID FROM E_M_EQUIP_SCRAP WHERE FLOW_ID = #{flowId} AND DEL_FLAG = 0

SELECT ID, SCRAP_CODE, TITLE, USE_COMPANY_ID, USE_ORG_ID, APPLY_USER, APPLY_REASON, EXECUTE_USER, EXECUTE_FULFIL_TIME, STATUS, DEL_FLAG, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, FLOW_ID FROM E_M_EQUIP_SCRAP WHERE ID = #{id} AND DEL_FLAG = 0
